function.name: stage_tracker

stage_list.name: Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory
stage_list.notes: Complete. 512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, 1 ADC, 3 I2C, 17 IPs linked. spec_advisory.md exists (12KB).

stage_list.name: Verification Planning
stage_list.notes: Complete. 97 checklist items across 18 domains, 21 scenario YAMLs, scenario_manifest.yaml, checklist.md+html.

stage_list.name: Generation (nc_chipgen generate)
stage_list.notes: Complete. Design root: mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/. 19/19 artifact validations passed. GDS/DEF/RTL/OpenLane configs present.

stage_list.name: Verification Execution (nc_chipgen verify)
stage_list.notes: Complete. 21/21 PASS, exit code 0. iverilog 12.0. coverage_report/ exists. summary.yaml present.

stage_list.name: Verification Review + Dashboard + Advisory
stage_list.notes: Complete. Verdict: PROCEED_TO_PNR, rework_target: NONE. 97/97 PASS. Dashboard + evaluation report + advisory all present.

stage_list.name: Physical Design (PnR)
stage_list.notes: DRT running autonomously (PID 824829, 403% CPU, ~5GB RAM). Synthesis 90,977 cells done. Floorplan, PDN, placement, global routing all done. CTS skipped (tool bug). DRT iter 2/64. Interim pnr_report.md exists. Final GDS pending DRT convergence (10-25h).
